title: which episode showed Eva 01 being born
display_title: which episode showed Eva 01 being born
wikitext:
[]: which episode showed Eva-01 being born Post by pmkava » Mon Apr 07, 2008 8:18 pm i know it showed Eva-01 ripping away from lilith at some point in the series or the movies. i just don't remember seeing it...exactly... could somebody possibly point me to a clip of it?

[]: Post by V » Mon Apr 07, 2008 9:01 pm this is weird: you see, in the "Director's Cut" version of Episode 23, during the scene where they reveal all of the Rei clones, right? during the Director's Cut, they insert new scenes. Well for this, they didn't insert a new scene exactly, but instead, they inserted still shots of various new things into the Rei clones scene while we're looking at the clones in the tank, making a montage. It's REALLY hard to see many of the images because they fade in and out of the clone images. But if you pause it and clean it up, we see the still shot of Eva-01 being "born from" Lilith by literally tearing itself away from Lilith's lower body in a mockery of the natural birth process.

[]: Post by pmkava » Mon Apr 07, 2008 9:32 pm ok i will have to look in on it

[]: Post by Ornette » Mon Apr 07, 2008 9:36 pm It was only in the individual release of the director's cuts, and NOT in platinum's director's cuts. You can see the clean version of this in the Full OP as well (I think).

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 07, 2008 10:00 pm I don't have clips exactly, but I have shitty JPEGs. http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-23/23_reiquarium.html http://www.evacommentary.org/full-op/full-op.html

[]: Post by pmkava » Mon Apr 07, 2008 10:30 pm Ornette wrote: It was only in the individual release of the director's cuts, and NOT in platinum's director's cuts.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 08, 2008 1:31 am Sure thing. This thread is probably done.
